title: Erythrodes paleacea

The plant is native to tropical regions of Asia, including India and parts of Southeast Asia. More specifically, it is classified within the genus Erythrodes, which is a group of small, terrestrial orchids. The classification of Erythrodes paleacea is a part of the larger taxonomic system that categorizes and organizes plant species.
